info.name: TRRCMS API v1
info.description:
# TRRCMS API Collection

Complete API collection for Tenure Rights Registration & Claims Management System.

## Quick Start

1. **Import** this collection and the environment file into Postman
2. **Select** 'TRRCMS Development' environment
3. **Run** appropriate login request (Admin, Field Collector, or Office Clerk)
4. **Follow** the numbered folders for your workflow

## Team Workflows

### 📱 Mobile Team (Field Collectors)
```
0. Auth → Login (Field Collector)
1. Buildings → Get Buildings (find building to survey)
2. Mobile Team → Create Field Survey
2. Mobile Team → Property Unit → Create/Link
2. Mobile Team → Household → Create
2. Mobile Team → Persons → Add persons
2. Mobile Team → Relations → Link persons to property
2. Mobile Team → Evidence → Upload photos/documents
2. Mobile Team → Finalize Field Survey
```

### 🖥️ Desktop Team (Office Clerks)
```
0. Auth → Login (Office Clerk)
1. Buildings → Get/Create Building
3. Desktop Team → Create Office Survey
3. Desktop Team → Property Unit → Create/Link
3. Desktop Team → Household → Create
3. Desktop Team → Persons → Add persons
3. Desktop Team → Relations → Link persons to property
3. Desktop Team → Evidence → Upload documents
3. Desktop Team → Finalize Office Survey (creates Claim)
4. Claims → View created claim
```

### 📋 Data Manager - Building Assignments (UC-012)
```
0. Auth → Login (Admin or Data Manager)
6. Building Assignments → Search Buildings (by hierarchy, radius, or polygon)
6. Building Assignments → Get Property Units for Revisit (optional)
6. Building Assignments → Get Available Field Collectors
6. Building Assignments → Assign Buildings to Collector
6. Building Assignments → View/Manage Assignments
```

### 👨‍💼 Admin Team
```
0. Auth → Login (Admin)
5. User Management → Full CRUD
1. Buildings → Full management
```

## Enum Reference

### UserRole
| Value | Name | Arabic |
|-------|------|--------|
| 1 | FieldCollector | جامع بيانات |
| 2 | FieldSupervisor | مشرف ميداني |
| 3 | OfficeClerk | موظف مكتب |
| 4 | DataManager | مدير بيانات |
| 5 | Analyst | محلل |
| 6 | Administrator | مدير النظام |

### PropertyUnitType
| Value | Name | Arabic |
|-------|------|--------|
| 1 | Apartment | شقة سكنية |
| 2 | Shop | محل تجاري |
| 3 | Office | مكتب |
| 4 | Warehouse | مستودع |
| 5 | Other | أخرى |

### PropertyUnitStatus
| Value | Name | Arabic |
|-------|------|--------|
| 1 | Occupied | مشغول |
| 2 | Vacant | شاغر |
| 3 | Damaged | متضرر |
| 4 | UnderRenovation | قيد الترميم |
| 5 | Uninhabitable | غير صالح للسكن |
| 6 | Locked | مغلق |
| 99 | Unknown | غير معروف |

### RelationType
| Value | Name | Arabic |
|-------|------|--------|
| 1 | Owner | مالك |
| 2 | Occupant | ساكن |
| 3 | Tenant | مستأجر |
| 4 | Guest | ضيف |
| 5 | Heir | وريث |
| 99 | Other | أخرى |

### TenureContractType
| Value | Name | Arabic |
|-------|------|--------|
| 1 | FullOwnership | ملكية تامة |
| 2 | SharedOwnership | ملكية مشتركة |
| 3 | LongTermRental | إيجار طويل الأمد |
| 4 | ShortTermRental | إيجار قصير الأمد |
| 5 | InformalTenure | حيازة غير رسمية |
| 6 | UnauthorizedOccupation | إشغال غير مصرح |
| 7 | CustomaryRights | حقوق عرفية |
| 8 | InheritanceBased | ميراث |
| 9 | HostedGuest | استضافة |
| 10 | TemporaryShelter | مأوى مؤقت |
| 11 | GovernmentAllocation | تخصيص حكومي |
| 12 | Usufruct | حق الانتفاع |
| 99 | Other | أخرى |

### EvidenceType
| Value | Name | Arabic |
|-------|------|--------|
| 1 | IdentificationDocument | بطاقة هوية |
| 2 | OwnershipDeed | سند ملكية |
| 3 | RentalContract | عقد إيجار |
| 4 | UtilityBill | فاتورة مرافق |
| 5 | Photo | صورة |
| 6 | OfficialLetter | رسالة رسمية |
| 7 | CourtOrder | أمر محكمة |
| 8 | InheritanceDocument | وثيقة ميراث |
| 9 | TaxReceipt | إيصال ضريبة |
| 99 | Other | أخرى |

### TransferStatus (حالة النقل)
| Value | Name | Arabic |
|-------|------|--------|
| 1 | Pending | قيد الانتظار |
| 2 | InProgress | جاري النقل |
| 3 | Transferred | تم النقل |
| 4 | Failed | فشل النقل |
| 5 | Cancelled | ملغي |
| 6 | PartialTransfer | نقل جزئي |
| 7 | Synchronized | متزامن |

### Priority (الأولوية)
| Value | Name | Arabic |
|-------|------|--------|
| Normal | عادي |
| High | عالي |
| Urgent | عاجل |

item.name: 0. Authentication

request.description:
Login as Administrator. Full system access.

**Response:**
- accessToken (15 min expiry)
- refreshToken (7 days expiry)
- userId, fullNameArabic, role

exec: console.log('✅ Field Collector logged in:', jsonData.fullNameArabic);

request.description:
Login as Field Collector for mobile survey workflow.

**Permissions:** Create/Edit own surveys, upload evidence

exec: console.log('✅ Office Clerk logged in:', jsonData.fullNameArabic);

request.description:
Login as Office Clerk for desktop survey workflow.

**Permissions:** Create/Edit surveys, finalize with claim creation

Refresh access token using refresh token.

Call when access token expires (15 min) or proactively.

exec: console.log('👤 Current user:', jsonData.fullNameArabic, '| Role:', jsonData.role);

request.description: Get current authenticated user info from JWT claims.
Logout current user. Client should discard tokens.

item.description:
Authentication endpoints. Run login first to get token.

**Token Lifetimes:**
- Access Token: 15 minutes
- Refresh Token: 7 days

item.name: 1. Building Management

request.description:
Get paginated list of buildings with optional filters.

**Filters:**
- Administrative codes (governorate, district, etc.)
- buildingType: 1=Residential, 2=Commercial, 3=MixedUse, 4=Industrial
- searchTerm: Search in building code or address
Get building details by GUID.

exec: console.log('✅ Building found, ID saved:', jsonData.id);

request.description:
Get building by 17-digit code.

**Code Format:** GG-DD-SS-CCC-NNN-BBBBB
- GG: Governorate (2 digits)
- DD: District (2 digits)
- SS: SubDistrict (2 digits)
- CCC: Community (3 digits)
- NNN: Neighborhood (3 digits)
- BBBBB: Building (5 digits)

exec: console.log('✅ First building ID saved:', jsonData.buildings[0].id);

request.description:
Search buildings with partial match on building code.

**BuildingId Partial Match:**
- Supports both formatted (01-01-01) and unformatted (010101) input
- Searches anywhere in the building code

**Examples:**
- `"01-01"` → Finds buildings starting with governorate 01, district 01
- `"01010101"` → Finds buildings in specific sub-district
- `"00001"` → Finds buildings with "00001" anywhere in code

**Filters:**
- governorateCode, districtCode, subDistrictCode, communityCode, neighborhoodCode
- buildingType: 1=Residential, 2=Commercial, 3=MixedUse, 4=Industrial
- status: Building status

**Pagination:**
- page: Page number (default: 1)
- pageSize: Items per page (default: 20, max: 100)

**Sorting:**
- sortBy: "buildingId", "createdDate", "status", "buildingType"
- sortDescending: true/false

body.raw:
{
  "buildingCode": "11010101001001",
  "buildingType": 1,
  "numberOfFloors": 4,
  "numberOfUnits": 8,
  "buildingCondition": 1,
  "constructionYear": 1995,
  "addressArabic": "شارع النصر، حي الجميلية، حلب",
  "gpsLatitude": 36.2021,
  "gpsLongitude": 37.1343,
  "notes": "مبنى سكني - 4 طوابق"
}

request.description:
Create a new building.

**Required:** buildingCode, buildingType

**BuildingType:**
- 1 = Residential (سكني)
- 2 = Commercial (تجاري)
- 3 = MixedUse (مختلط)
- 4 = Industrial (صناعي)

**BuildingCondition:**
- 1 = Good (جيد)
- 2 = Fair (متوسط)
- 3 = Poor (سيء)
- 4 = Damaged (متضرر)
- 5 = Destroyed (مدمر)
Update building details. Only provided fields are updated.

exec: console.log('ℹ️ Building is marked as deleted but data retained for audit');

request.description:
Soft delete a building (Admin only).

**What happens:**
- Sets `IsDeleted = true`
- Records `DeletedAtUtc` timestamp
- Records `DeletedBy` user ID
- Building no longer appears in queries
- Data retained for audit and potential recovery

**Required Permission:** Buildings_Delete (4003) - CanDeleteBuildings policy

**Request Body (optional):**
```json
{
  "reason": "Reason for deletion"
}
```

**Note:** This is a soft delete. Data can be recovered if needed.
Get all property units in a building.

Search buildings within a polygon using coordinates array.
البحث عن المباني داخل مضلع جغرافي

**Format:** [[lng, lat], [lng, lat], ...]
**Auto-closes:** Polygon closes automatically if first != last

**Test Areas:**
- الجميلية: Lat 36.2020-36.2060, Lng 37.1340-37.1400
- العزيزية: Lat 36.1960-36.2010, Lng 37.1340-37.1400
- الشهباء: Lat 36.2080-36.2140, Lng 37.1340-37.1400

Search using WKT format.

**WKT Format:** POLYGON((lng lat, lng lat, ...))
**SRID:** 4326 (WGS84)
**Note:** First and last coordinate must be identical

Search large area covering multiple neighborhoods.

**Expected:** Buildings from:
- الجميلية الشرقية
- العزيزية
- الشهباء

exec: console.log('🏠 Filtered by Type - Found:', jsonData.totalCount);

request.description:
Filter by building type.

**BuildingType:**
- 1 = Residential (سكني)
- 2 = Commercial (تجاري)
- 3 = MixedUse (مختلط)
- 4 = Industrial (صناعي)

Include full building details.

**includeFullDetails: true**
- Includes complete BuildingDto in `fullDetails`
- Includes `buildingGeometryWkt` (PostGIS Point WKT)

item.description:
Building management endpoints.

**Used by:** Desktop Team, Admin, GIS Team

**Endpoints:**
- GET /Buildings - Get all buildings (paginated)
- GET /Buildings/{id} - Get by GUID
- GET /Buildings/code/{code} - Get by building code
- POST /Buildings/search - Search with partial match
- POST /Buildings - Create building
- PUT /Buildings/{id} - Update building
- DELETE /Buildings/{id} - Soft delete
- POST /Buildings/polygon - **NEW** Search in polygon (PostGIS)

**Polygon Search Input Options:**
- Coordinates: [[lng, lat], [lng, lat], ...]
- WKT: POLYGON((lng lat, lng lat, ...))

**BuildingType:**
1=Residential, 2=Commercial, 3=MixedUse, 4=Industrial

**BuildingStatus:**
1=Existing/Intact, 2=UnderConstruction, 3=Damaged, 4=Destroyed

**Permissions:**
- Buildings_View (4000)
- Buildings_Create (4001)
- Buildings_Update (4002)
- Buildings_Delete (4003)

request.description:
**UC-001 Stage 3** - Create household in survey.

**Demographic Breakdown:**
- Adults (18-64): maleCount, femaleCount
- Children (<18): maleChildCount, femaleChildCount
- Elderly (65+): maleElderlyCount, femaleElderlyCount
- Disabled (any age): maleDisabledCount, femaleDisabledCount
Get all households for survey.

**UC-001 Stage 3** - Add person to household as head.

**Required:** familyNameArabic, firstNameArabic, fatherNameArabic

**RelationshipToHead:** Head, Spouse, Child, Parent, Sibling, Other

**isContactPerson:** Set to `true` to designate this person as the survey contact person. Only one person per survey should be marked as contact.
Add spouse to household.
Get all persons in household.
Set or change household head.

item.description: Stage 3: Household registration and person management

**ContractType:** 1=FullOwnership, 2=SharedOwnership, 3=LongTermRental, etc.

request.description:
**UC-001 Final Stage** - Finalize field survey.

Marks survey as Finalized, ready for export to .uhc container.

**Note:** Field surveys do NOT auto-create claims (unlike office surveys).

item.description: Final stage: Save draft or finalize survey

## 📱 Mobile Team - Field Survey Flow

**Use Cases:** UC-001 (Field Survey), UC-002 (Resume Draft)

**Workflow:**
1. Login as Field Collector
2. Get/Select Building
3. Create Field Survey
4. Create/Link Property Unit
5. Create Household
6. Add Persons to Household
7. Create Person-Property Relations
8. Upload Evidence (photos, documents)
9. Finalize Survey

**Reference Code Format:** FLD-YYYY-NNNNN

item.name: 3. Desktop Team - Office Survey
3.1 Create Survey

body.raw:
{
  "buildingId": "{{buildingId}}",

  "registrationNumber": "REG-2026-001234",
  "inPersonVisit": true,

  "intervieweeRelationship": "مالك العقار",
  "contactPhone": "+963912345678",
  "contactEmail": "owner@example.com",
  "notes": "زيارة مكتبية - المراجع يحمل سند ملكية"
}

- contactPhone/contactEmail: For follow-up
**UC-005** - Get current clerk's draft office surveys.
Get all office surveys with filtering and pagination.

Update office survey details (Draft only).

item.name: 3.6 Finalize

exec: console.log('ℹ️ No claim created (no ownership relations or autoCreateClaim=false)');

request.description:
**UC-004 Final Stage** - Finalize office survey and create claim.

**autoCreateClaim=true:**
- Generates claim number (CLM-YYYY-NNNNNNNNN)
- Creates claim with ClaimSource=OfficeSubmission
- Links claim to survey

**Requires:** At least one Owner/Heir relation

item.description: Finalize survey and auto-create claim

## 🖥️ Desktop Team - Office Survey Flow

**Use Cases:** UC-004 (Office Survey), UC-005 (Resume Draft)

**Workflow:**
1. Login as Office Clerk
2. Get/Create Building
3. Create Office Survey
4. Create/Link Property Unit
5. Create Household
6. Add Claimant Person
7. Create Owner Relation
8. Upload Documents (deed, ID)
9. Finalize Survey → Creates Claim

**Reference Code Format:** OFC-YYYY-NNNNN

**Key Difference from Field Survey:**
- Office surveys can auto-create claims on finalization
- Field surveys are exported to .uhc containers

item.name: 4. Claims

request.description: Get claim details by ID.
Get claim by claim number (CLM-YYYY-NNNNNNNNN).

item.description:
Claims viewing endpoints.

**Claim Number Format:** CLM-YYYY-NNNNNNNNN

**Note:** Claims are auto-created when office surveys with ownership relations are finalized.

item.name: 6. Building Assignments (UC-012)
6.1 Search Buildings

exec: console.log('✅ First building saved for assignment');

request.description:
Search buildings available for assignment.
البحث عن المباني المتاحة للتعيين

**UC-012: S01-S03** - Search and select buildings

**Required Permission:** Buildings_View (4000)

**Filters:**
- Administrative hierarchy (governorate→neighborhood)
- buildingCode, address (partial match)
- buildingType, buildingStatus
- hasActiveAssignment: null=all, true=assigned, false=unassigned

**Spatial Options:**
- Radius: latitude, longitude, radiusMeters
- Polygon: polygonWkt (WKT format)

exec: console.log('📍 Radius Search - Found:', jsonData.totalCount, 'buildings within 1km');

request.description:
Search buildings within radius.
البحث بنصف القطر

**Parameters:**
- latitude, longitude: Center point
- radiusMeters: Search radius in meters

**Note:** Uses meters-to-degrees conversion for PostGIS SRID 4326

exec: console.log('   Available:', available, '| Assigned:', jsonData.items.length - available);

request.description:
Search buildings in polygon using coordinates array.
البحث داخل مضلع جغرافي

**UC-012: Polygon Search**

**Polygon Input Options:**
1. coordinates: [[lng, lat], ...] - Auto-closes if needed
2. polygonWkt: "POLYGON((lng lat, ...))"

**Response includes:**
- polygonWkt: Parsed WKT string
- polygonAreaSquareMeters: Approximate area

Search using WKT format via GET.

**WKT Format:** POLYGON((lng lat, lng lat, ...))
**SRID:** 4326 (WGS84)
**Note:** First and last coordinate must be identical

item.description: Search buildings for assignment using various filters.

item.name: 6.2 Property Units (Revisit)

request.description:
Get property units for revisit selection.
عرض الوحدات العقارية لاختيار إعادة الزيارة

**UC-012: S04-S05** - Review property units

**Use when:** Creating revisit assignment to select specific units

**Response includes:**
- unitCode, unitType, floorNumber
- hasCompletedSurvey, lastSurveyDate
- personCount, householdCount, claimCount

item.description: Property unit selection for revisit assignments.

item.name: 6.3 Field Collectors

exec: console.log('   ' + (i+1) + '. ' + c.fullNameArabic + ' - Active: ' + c.activeAssignments + ', Units: ' + c.totalPropertyUnitsAssigned);

request.description:
Get available field collectors with workload info.
عرض جامعي البيانات المتاحين

**Required Permission:** Buildings_Assign (4003)

**Filters:**
- isAvailable: true/false/null
- hasAssignedTablet: Has tablet assigned
- teamName, searchTerm

**Sorting:** By workload (least busy first by default)

**Response includes:**
- activeAssignments, pendingTransferCount
- totalPropertyUnitsAssigned

Get assignments for a specific field collector.
عرض المباني المعينة لجامع بيانات

**Filters:**
- isActive: true/false/null
- transferStatus: 1-7 (see TransferStatus enum)
- isRevisit: Filter revisit assignments

**Response includes:**
- Summary: totalAssignments, pendingTransfer, readyForSurvey, completed
- Assignments list with details

item.description: Field collector selection and workload management.

item.name: 6.4 Assign/Unassign

request.description:
Assign buildings to field collector.
تعيين مباني لجامع بيانات

**UC-012: S06-S07** - Create assignment

**Required Permission:** Buildings_Assign (4003)

**Supports:**
- Bulk assignment (multiple buildings)
- Priority: Normal, High, Urgent
- Assignment notes

**Note:** Transfer to tablet happens during sync, not immediately.
Initial TransferStatus = Pending (1)

Create revisit assignment for specific property units.
تعيين إعادة زيارة لوحدات محددة

**Revisit Assignment:**
- propertyUnitIdsForRevisit: List of unit GUIDs
- revisitReason: Reason for revisit (Arabic)

**Common Revisit Reasons:**
- بيانات ناقصة - Missing data
- تحديث معلومات - Update information
- تصحيح أخطاء - Correct errors
- معلومات إضافية مطلوبة - Additional info required

Get assignment details by ID.
عرض تفاصيل التعيين

**Response includes:**
- Building info (code, address, hierarchy)
- Collector info (name, device)
- Transfer status and dates
- Progress (completed/total units)
- Revisit info if applicable

Cancel/unassign a building assignment.
إلغاء تعيين مبنى

**Required Permission:** Buildings_Assign (4003)

**Restrictions:**
- Cannot cancel if TransferStatus = Synchronized (7)
- Cannot cancel already inactive assignments
- Cancellation reason required

**What happens:**
- IsActive = false
- TransferStatus = Cancelled (5)
- Reason recorded in AssignmentNotes

item.description: Create and manage building assignments.

## 📋 Building Assignments (UC-012)

**Requires:** Administrator or DataManager role

**Permissions:**
- Buildings_View (4000) - Search buildings, view assignments
- Buildings_Assign (4003) - Create/cancel assignments

**Workflow:**
1. Search buildings (by hierarchy, radius, or polygon)
2. Select property units for revisit (optional)
3. Get available field collectors
4. Assign buildings to collector
5. Monitor assignment status

**TransferStatus Flow:**
```
Pending (1) → InProgress (2) → Transferred (3) → Synchronized (7)
                              ↓
                           Failed (4) → Retry
                              ↓
                        Cancelled (5)
```

**Priority Values:** Normal, High, Urgent

item.name: 5. User Management (Admin)

request.description:
Get all users with filtering and pagination.

**Filters:**
- role: 1-6 (see UserRole enum)
- isActive: true/false
- searchTerm: Search username, name, email
Get user details including permissions list.

body.raw:
{
  "username": "fc002",
  "email": "fc002@trrcms.org",
  "fullNameArabic": "خالد محمود علي",
  "fullNameEnglish": "Khaled Mahmoud Ali",
  "phoneNumber": "+963 992 345 678",
  "role": 1,
  "password": "TempPass123!",
  "hasMobileAccess": true,
  "hasDesktopAccess": false,
  "organization": "فريق حلب الميداني",
  "jobTitle": "جامع بيانات"
}

Create new Field Collector user.

Update user profile (partial update).
Reactivate a deactivated user.
Deactivate user account.

Grant additional permissions to user.

- Evidence: 2000 (View), 2001 (Upload), 2002 (Verify)
- Surveys: 7000 (Create), 7004 (ViewAll)
Revoke a specific permission from user.

item.description:
## 👨‍💼 User Management (Admin Only)

**Requires:** Administrator role

**Operations:**
- CRUD users
- Activate/Deactivate accounts
- Unlock locked accounts
- Grant/Revoke permissions
- View audit logs

item.name: 7. Sync Protocol (UC-003/UC-012)

request.description:
**Sync Step 1** - Open a sync session.

Returns `syncSessionId` required for Steps 2-4.

**Required Permission:** CanSyncData (System_Sync 9010)
**Roles:** FieldCollector, FieldSupervisor, Administrator

**Session Status:**
- 1 = InProgress
- 2 = Completed
- 3 = PartiallyCompleted
- 4 = Failed

**FSD:** FR-D-1

formdata.description: SHA-256 of data table contents (excluding manifest and attachments)

request.description:
**Sync Step 2** - Upload a .uhc survey package.

**Max Size:** 500 MB | **Content-Type:** multipart/form-data

**Idempotent:** Same package uploaded twice returns `accepted=true, isDuplicate=true`.

**Checksum:** SHA-256 of all data table contents sorted by table/row/column. Excludes manifest and attachments tables.

**Response:**
- `accepted=true, isDuplicate=false` - New package stored
- `accepted=true, isDuplicate=true` - Already received (idempotent)
- `accepted=false` - Checksum mismatch, session marked Failed

**FSD:** FR-D-2, FR-D-3

query.description: Optional: ISO-8601 UTC. Omit for full download. Pass previous payloadAssembledAtUtc for incremental sync.

request.description:
**Sync Step 3** - Download building assignments and full vocabulary snapshot.

**Returns:**
- `assignments` - Pending/Failed assignments for this collector
- `vocabularies` - All controlled vocabularies (bilingual Arabic/English)
- `payloadAssembledAtUtc` - Use as `modifiedSinceUtc` on next sync

**Incremental Sync:** Pass `modifiedSinceUtc` from previous response to get only new/changed assignments.

**Vocabulary Format:**
```json
{
  "name": "building_type",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "values": [
    { "code": 1, "labelArabic": "\u0633\u0643\u0646\u064a", "labelEnglish": "Residential" }
  ]
}
```

**FSD:** FR-D-4 (Vocabulary Distribution), FR-D-5 (Download Assignments)

**Sync Step 4** - Confirm tablet stored the downloaded assignments.

**Idempotent:** Already-transferred assignments are silently skipped.

**Effect per assignment:** Pending/Failed -> Transferred

**Session closes:** Completed (all ok) or PartiallyCompleted (some packages failed).

**assignmentIds:** The `assignmentId` values received in Step 3 response.

**FSD:** FR-D-6 (Transfer Acknowledgement)

item.description:
## Sync Protocol (UC-003/UC-012)

**Required Permission:** CanSyncData (System_Sync 9010)
**Roles:** FieldCollector, FieldSupervisor, Administrator

**4-Step LAN Sync Protocol (offline-first tablets):**
```
Step 1: POST /sync/session          -> Open session, get syncSessionId
Step 2: POST /sync/upload           -> Upload .uhc survey package
Step 3: GET  /sync/assignments      -> Download assignments + vocabularies
Step 4: POST /sync/assignments/ack  -> Acknowledge receipt
```

**Package Format:** .uhc files (renamed SQLite3 databases) containing: surveys, buildings, building_documents, property_units, persons, households, person_property_relations, claims, evidences, attachments.

**New in v1.1:**
- `building_documents` table for building photos/documents
- `is_contact_person` column on persons table
- `contact_person_id` column on surveys table
- `building_document_count` in manifest record counts

**Session Status Flow:**
InProgress (1) -> Completed (2)
               -> PartiallyCompleted (3) [some packages failed]
               -> Failed (4) [checksum mismatch]

**Assignment Transfer Status:**
Pending (1) -> InProgress (2) -> Transferred (3)
           -> Failed (4) -> retry on next sync

item.name: 8. Import Pipeline (UC-003)

request.description:
**Import Step 1** - Upload a .uhc package for import.

Performs integrity checks (checksum, signature, vocabulary compatibility).

**Max Size:** 500 MB | **Content-Type:** multipart/form-data

**Idempotent:** Same package uploaded twice returns `isDuplicatePackage=true`.

**FSD:** FR-D-2, FR-D-3

query.description: Filter by status (Pending, Staging, Validating, StagingComplete, DuplicateDetection, WaitingForApproval, ReadyToCommit, Committing, Completed, Failed, Cancelled, Quarantined)

request.description:
**Get Packages** - List all import packages with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.

Returns paginated list of packages and their statuses.

exec: console.log('  Entities: Buildings=' + (data.buildingCount || 0) + ', BuildingDocs=' + (data.buildingDocumentCount || 0) + ', Persons=' + (data.personCount || 0) + ', Surveys=' + (data.surveyCount || 0));

request.description: **Get Package** - Retrieve a specific import package by ID.
**Import Step 2** - Trigger staging (unpack .uhc → staging tables) and row-level validation.
**Get Validation Report** - Read-only current validation report for a package.

query.description: Optional filter: Building, BuildingDocument, PropertyUnit, Person, Household, PersonPropertyRelation, Survey, Claim, Evidence

request.description:
**Get Staged Entities** - All staged entities for a package with their IDs and status. Used by conflict resolution UI.

**Entity Types:** Building, BuildingDocument, PropertyUnit, Person, Household, PersonPropertyRelation, Survey, Claim, Evidence
**Import Step 3** - Trigger duplicate detection (person + property matching) for a staged package.
**Import Step 4** - Approve staging records for commit. Requires all conflicts resolved.
**Import Step 5** - Commit approved staging records to production tables. Generates Record IDs (FR-D-8) and deduplicates attachments (FR-D-9).
**Get Commit Report** - Report for a completed/failed import package.
**Reset Stuck Commit** - Reset a package stuck in Committing/Failed back to ReadyToCommit. Preserves staging data & approvals.
**Cancel Package** - Cancel an active import package.
**Quarantine Package** - Quarantine a suspicious import package (UC-003 S12b).

item.description:
## Import Pipeline (UC-003)

**Required Permission:** CanImportData (System_Import permission)
**Roles:** DataManager, OfficeClerk, FieldSupervisor, Administrator

**5-Stage Import Workflow:**
```
Step 1: POST /import/upload              -> Upload .uhc package
Step 2: POST /import/packages/{id}/stage -> Extract & validate
Step 3: POST /import/packages/{id}/detect-duplicates -> Find conflicts
Step 4: POST /import/packages/{id}/approve          -> Approve for commit
Step 5: POST /import/packages/{id}/commit           -> Atomic commit to production
```

**Package Status Flow:**
Pending -> Staging -> Validating -> StagingComplete -> DuplicateDetection -> WaitingForApproval -> ReadyToCommit -> Committing -> Completed

**Package Contents:** .uhc files (SQLite3 databases) containing buildings, building_documents, property_units, persons, households, person_property_relations, surveys, claims, evidences, attachments.

**Schema v1.1 Changes:**
- Added `building_documents` table (building photos/scans)
- Added `is_contact_person` (INTEGER) to persons table
- Added `contact_person_id` (UUID FK) to surveys table
- Added `building_document_count` to manifest
- Removed `location_description` from buildings table

**FSD:** FR-D-2, FR-D-3, FR-D-8, FR-D-9

item.name: 9. Conflict Resolution (UC-007/UC-008)

request.description: **Conflict Summary** - Aggregate conflict counts for the dashboard.
**Conflict Resolution Queue** - List all conflicts with filtering, sorting, and pagination.
**UC-007** - List property duplicate review queue (buildings/units flagged as potential duplicates).
**UC-008** - List person duplicate review queue (persons sharing national_id).
**Senior Review Queue** - Escalated conflicts pending supervisor investigation (UC-007 S05a / UC-008 S05a).

**Conflict Details** - Full conflict details for side-by-side review.

UC-007 S03-S04: Property detail comparison with codes, location, geometry.
UC-008 S03-S04: Person detail comparison with names, IDs, documents.
**Get Conflict** - Alternative endpoint to get conflict details (without /details suffix).

**Document Comparison** - Side-by-side evidence/document comparison for conflict pair.

UC-008 S04: Loads all evidence files and documents for both entities for review.

**Merge Conflict** - Execute merge with selected master record.

UC-007 S06: Apply Property Merge Rules - consolidate property records.
UC-008 S06: Apply Person Merge Rules - consolidate person records.

Propagates FK changes and builds audit trail.

exec: console.log('\u2705 Marked as separate. Status:', data.status);

request.description:
**Keep Separate** - Mark as reviewed, not duplicate. Keeps records separate.

UC-007 S05(b)/S06: Records are distinct properties.
UC-008 S05(b)/S06: Records are different individuals.

Prevents re-surfacing unless detection rules change.

**Resolve Conflict** - General-purpose resolution endpoint (any action: merge, keep-both, keep-first, keep-second).

For UC-007/UC-008, prefer /merge or /keep-separate endpoints.

exec: console.log('\u26a0\ufe0f Escalated to senior review. Status:', data.status);

request.description:
**Escalate Conflict** - Escalate to senior/supervisor review.

UC-007 S05a: Complex property case requiring investigation.
UC-008 S05a: Complex person case (partial IDs, conflicting docs).

Sets IsEscalated=true and Priority=High. Adds to senior review queue.

item.description:
## Conflict Resolution (UC-007/UC-008)

**Required Permission:** CanImportData (System_Import permission)
**Roles:** DataManager, OfficeClerk, FieldSupervisor, Administrator

### UC-007: Property Duplicate Resolution
**Workflow:** Review queue (S01-S02) → Side-by-side comparison (S03-S04) → Merge/Keep-Separate (S05-S06) → Optional Escalation (S05a)

Property records flagged as potential duplicates based on:
- Same building_id (within unit)
- Composite key (building_id + unit_code) matches

### UC-008: Person Duplicate Resolution
**Workflow:** Review queue (S01-S02) → Side-by-side comparison (S03-S04) → Document comparison (S04) → Merge/Keep-Separate (S05-S06) → Optional Escalation (S05a)

Person records sharing the same national_id value (including within-batch duplicates).

### Resolution Actions
- **Merge:** Master-detail selection, consolidates entities, propagates FK changes
- **Keep Separate:** No merge, prevents re-surfacing
- **Escalate:** Complex cases to supervisor investigation

**FSD:** FR-D-5, FR-D-6, FR-D-7

item.name: 10. Dashboard (FR-D-12)

request.description:
**Dashboard Summary** - Aggregated statistics for the desktop application dashboard.

**Returns:**
- `claims` — Total, by status, overdue, with conflicts, awaiting documents, pending verification
- `surveys` — Total, by status, field/office split, completed last 7/30 days
- `imports` — Total packages, by status, active, unresolved conflicts, entities imported
- `buildings` — Total buildings, property units, by status, by damage level, average units per building
- `generatedAtUtc` — Timestamp of report generation

**Requires:** Any authenticated user [Authorize]

**FSD:** FR-D-12

item.description:
## Dashboard (FR-D-12)

**Desktop Application Dashboard Endpoint**

Provides real-time aggregated statistics for the desktop team's status overview:

### Claims Section
- Total claims count
- Breakdown by status (Draft, Submitted, UnderReview, Verified, Approved, Rejected)
- Breakdown by lifecycle stage
- Overdue count
- Claims with unresolved conflicts
- Claims awaiting documents
- Claims pending verification

### Surveys Section
- Total surveys count
- Breakdown by status (Draft, InProgress, Completed, Cancelled)
- Field surveys vs office surveys split
- Completed in last 7 days
- Completed in last 30 days

### Imports Section
- Total import packages
- Breakdown by status (Pending, Completed, Failed, Cancelled, Quarantined)
- Active packages in pipeline
- Packages with unresolved conflicts
- Total entities imported (surveys, buildings, persons)

### Buildings Section
- Total buildings
- Total property units
- Breakdown by building status (Occupied, Damaged, Destroyed, etc.)
- Breakdown by damage level (None, Minor, Major, Destroyed)
- Average property units per building

**Policy:** [Authorize] — Any authenticated user
